title: hymenophyllum umbratile
intro: Hymenophyllum umbratile, also known as the umbrella fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is known for its unique umbrella-shaped fronds that provide shelter for small animals and insects. The medicinal properties of Hymenophyllum umbratile include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and promoting digestion, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried and powdered for consumption.
